feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing
feed.subtitle: SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PO from external system missing in SAP
entry.content:
Dear community,

we have a PO number which was created in our external buying platform Agora (similar to Ariba) and usually it's automatically sent to SAP but there we cannot find it. It says "this document doesn't exist".

Do you know how to solve this issue?

Thanks a lot,

Zoran

entry.title: Is this scenario possible in Ariba?
entry.content: In Ariba Buying, while creating a purchase requisition then the budget of purchase requisition maintained in a third party system, when a requisitioner create a requisition before submitting the budget should be check in third party system. Weather it is possible in Ariba?

entry.title: Ariba invoicing
entry.content: In Ariba Invoicing, My supplier has 4 bank accounts in Sap ERP, During the payment of invoice, as a account payable consultant which bank I need to select to pay the invoice from?

entry.title: Scheduling Agreement failing in Ariba CIG
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to send scheduling agreement from S4 HANA to Ariba Network. But it is failing with the below error.

Would you please help in identifying the root cause.

BusinessNetwork response is :"Forbidden" and ErrorCode:"403" and ErrorResponse:"Error:Schedule agreement releases require Collaborative Supply Chain relation between Buyer and Supplier Please contact support with the Error Reference Number: ANERR-140000000000000004373275732 for more details.. Suggested Action : Document failed in Business Network.ErrorCode:CIG-PLT-00644.

entry.title: How to create approval process for purchase requisition changes in SAP Ariba Procurement
entry.content:
I am looking for examples or best practices in how to edit an existing purchase requisition approval process in SAP Ariba Procurement to support change orders. What would be the options for Approval Rules, Filter Rules, and Approvable Edit Rules to support modified approvals for a requisition in Ordered status. I am not looking for an exhaustive list; just an example or two of best practices.

For example, I have heard there is a condition that can be selected that basically, "says that the original conditions are valid only for the first version of the requisition." What field or predefined condition would this be? I am not currently seeing a field or predefined condition that would fit this description.

Additionally, would this condition be applied for all nodes or would you need to create this condition for every node in the original approval flow?

I have looked for documentation or examples to support setting up the approval process for a requisition change and do not seem to be able to find anything on this aspect of the approval process. Can an example be provided or a reference provided where one can better learn how to setup an approval process that supports change orders for purchase requisitions?

As an example of what would be helpful to see, what could the approval process look like for a requisition change where you would want to keep the approval in place only for requisitions changed by more than a certain threshold, such as a 10% increase for a line item or total cost? If below this threshold they would auto approve.

Thank you!!

entry.title: I need to create a trigger in ARIBA PR (Document Approval API) that sends a POST via API
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am carrying out a project to centralize all approvals.
Therefore, I need to centralize ARIBA approval in this single application and for this I am using the API (Document Approval API and External Approval for Sourcing). My problem is consulting ARIBA every minute to find out if a new approval has arrived and I would like to know how to have a trigger in the workflow to inform me that a new approval has arrived or some possibility of direct connection between my app and Ariba to know when something new arrived and consult only this new workflow.

entry.title: Is it possible to make SAP Ariba email notifications be treated as internal emails for our client?
entry.content:
Our client has raised a question of the email notifications they receive from SAP Ariba can be treated as internal instead of external by removing the label "External"? Is it possible to make SAP Ariba email notifications be treated as internal emails for our client? Is this achievable through DMARC and how can this be accomplished?

#DMARC

entry.title: How can we map unplanned delivery cost like freight handling charge from Ariba to SAP.
entry.content:
How can unplanned delivery cost like freight , handling charge added at the time of submitting invoice in Ariba , be mapped to particular GL account in SAP , while posting through MIRO. 

Ex- PO created with amount 1000 inr in Ariba
while submitting inv additional amount of handling charge 20 INR is added. 
Now how system determines to which GL this handling charge will post to , once Invoice is interfaced from Ariba to SAP.

entry.title: New brand name SAP Buying replacing SAP Guided buying
entry.content:
"SAP Guided Buying" is now re-branded to "SAP Buying" as you can see below .

 

 

The below information is visible in SAP enable now :

 

 

Is Guided buying capability/feature now called "SAP buying" ? Is there a new name for SAP buying and Invoicing too ? How do I refer to Ariba Guided buying and Ariba buying and invoicing ?

 

Regards,

Saurav Agarwal

entry.title: Invoice rejected in CIG with Error: not found in Partner Directory
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For Document type: Invoice Details Request, for one supplier the invoice is being rejected with below error.

Error Description:
"Failed to resolve endpoint: xslt://pd:HCIOWNERPID:MAPPING_ANY_cXML_0000_InvoiceDetailRequest_AddOn_ARBCI30000_Invoice%20MAPPING_ANY_cXML_0000_InvoiceDetailRequest_AddOn_ARBCI10001_Invoice:Binary?output=bytes&saxon=true&saxonExtensionFunctions=%23xsltExtensionsV11&uriResolverFactory=%23xsltUriResolverFactory due to: Resource 'pd:HCIOWNERPID:MAPPING_ANY_cXML_0000_InvoiceDetailRequest_AddOn_ARBCI30000_Invoice MAPPING_ANY_cXML_0000_InvoiceDetailRequest_AddOn_ARBCI10001_Invoice:Binary' not found in Partner Directory".

Can anyone please help me with the resolution steps for this endpoint issue?

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: How to authenticate users while consuming APIs in Ariba
entry.content:
Hi,

I have activated an API in Ariba and got application key, client id and secret. I can call the API using Postman and get the response back.

One of my colleague, who doesn't have access to Ariba can also consume the API and get the results back.

Our requirement is to authenticate the user and check the user roles by the system before provide the results back only if user is authorized to access that specific data.

For example, if user has authorization to display only PRs, but not POs in Ariba system and if the user try to consume the API to retrieve PO related data, system should give an error message saying that user does not have access to PO data

Can you please provide some guidance on this requirement.

Thanks,

Sagar.

entry.title: SAP Ariba: Export of Ariba Data - Data Warehouse (Data Strategy)
entry.content:
Hello ~ I am reaching out with this question to the SAP Ariba SCM community. We are using SAP Ariba Sourcing, Contracts, Buying, and Invoicing and are exploring options to export the data and land it in our data warehouse. This was attempted a couple of years ago with the creation of templates and exporting data via Analytical API. However, there are challenges with this approach: 1) Keeping Ariba record changes and deletions in synch with the DW; 2) Analytical API limits are reached due to high volumes of data; and 3) Templates that contain vector fields have a lower Analytical API limit (5,000 per day). Also, as an FYI, our ERP system is PeopleSoft Financials.
If you have successfully implemented an SAP Ariba data strategy with the export of data to a DW, I would really appreciate a response to this post. We are open to all ideas - internal middleware development using SAP Ariba APIs, SAP solutions, non-SAP solutions, etc. Thank you!

entry.title: Post SAP Credit memo based on Original invoice - interface Ariba to SAP
entry.content:
Supplier is posting Invoice and  credit memo in Ariba / EzBuy. after that  those are parking automatically in SAP via ABAP PROGRAM RUN as format of ok2pay file interface..

those OK2PAY file are coming from Ariba to SAP and parking invoice and credit memo in SAP.

Supplier posted PO / NPO invoice in Ariba after that Invoice parked in SAP using SAP ABAP custom program execution.

after that user are posting that invoice  in SAP. ( Park to Posting )

next - some cases

Supplier created CREDIT MEMO based on original invoice in Ariba.

requirement : after posting any credit memo in Ariba ,while credit memo will park in SAP , that time SAP original  Invoice number must be added automatically in t code MIR4 credit memo- under payment Tab invoice reference / year.

example : user posting Invoice and credit memo Ariba and 

SAP Invoice number - 1001 - parked by ABAP program => POSTED by user

  credit memo number - 1002.-PARKED -   by ABAP program run.

while user will open this Credit memo in MIR4 , go to payment TAB.

user wanted to see that invoice reference number / year in Inv. ref field means 101 /2024

summary - while parking from posting this credit memo, user can see original invoice number

How can we implement this scenario by adding new enhancement exiting program

entry.title: Is Ariba ready for E-Invoicing Processing?X-Rechnung, ZUGFeRD, Fattura PA
entry.content:
Can Ariba support the creation or processing of invoices in XML formats such as X-Rechnung, ZUGFeRD, Fattura PA, and Fatur X for invoices that are manually created by the supplier in the Ariba network, submitted via CSV file, submitted through the supplier's backend ERP, or sent to Ariba via an OCR solution?
invoice complies with the EN16931 standard?

entry.title: ariba user provisioning
entry.content:
Hello all,

My customer would like to know what are the possibilities for provisioning users in SAP Ariba using Azure AD. Do any of you have any experience with this?

Regards,

Isobel.

entry.title: ARIBA mutiple ERP enviornment
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

In case multiple erp level configurations, lets say if customer has multiple SAP ERP systems, does customer needs to buy individual downstream (B&I) license for each erp. If so, how the variant and partition is determined for each child realms.

Can anyone please clarify. Thank you.

entry.title: Use of multiple bank accounts in the operational process (buying, invoicing)
entry.content:
In our SAP ERP there are many suppliers with multiple bank details. Currently, the development is set up so that the first bank account is always used in the invoicing process.

It should now be checked whether and how it could be determined in Ariba which bank details should be selected.

Does anyone have experience with this and could share it with us?

entry.title: SAP ARIBA : How to get delivery date in ARIBA reporting
entry.content:
Hi all, 

Does anyone know how to get the delivery date provided by the supplier in the ASN in ARIBA REPORTING ?  

My purpose is prepare a table to compare "The need by date of PO line items" with "the delivery date provided by the supplier" and "reception date", to prevent in delays in our P2P process.  

I found a field called "Delivery date" in receipt table but it's not working (blank values) even if dates are already available in PO line items.

Any help on this issue please ! 

SAP Ariba Buying and Invoicing

entry.title: PO not sent to ariba network
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

No SLP is opted, just in B&I, when a supplier is created manually with partioned information from ERP,  order is not being sent to ariba. system gives the below error message

Response returned with status Code [403] of Type [Forbidden] with message [Error:No relationship with Supplier

Second, also if you could advise, incase of B&I, if suppliers are synchronised from ERP, how can we trigger the notification for the supplier to do membership in network portal.

Please advise, thank you.

entry.title: Ariba Tally Integration
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working for Ariba Procurement to Tally Integration, I am looking for suitable KBA or the document for Tally Integration. Ariba Invoicing has to be integrated with Tally solutions.

Do Ariba have any standard API for the Tally integration.

Middleware architure documents available in Ariba connect.
